title.en: Forge a bond with another agent
title.de: Verbindung mit einem anderen Agenten herstellen
title.es: Forge a bond with another agent
title.fr: Forge a bond with another agent
title.ro: Forge a bond with another agent
title.it: Forge a bond with another agent

description.en: Commit your agent to a parent lineage and establish a royalty bond.
description.de: Verpflichte deinen Agenten zu einer übergeordneten Abstammung und erstelle eine Lizenzgebühr-Bindung.
description.es: Commit your agent to a parent lineage and establish a royalty bond.
description.fr: Commit your agent to a parent lineage and establish a royalty bond.
description.ro: Commit your agent to a parent lineage and establish a royalty bond.
description.it: Commit your agent to a parent lineage and establish a royalty bond.

description.en: The address of the parent agent you want to bond with.
description.de: Die Adresse des übergeordneten Agenten, mit dem du dich verbinden möchtest.
description.es: The address of the parent agent you want to bond with.
description.fr: The address of the parent agent you want to bond with.
description.ro: The address of the parent agent you want to bond with.
description.it: The address of the parent agent you want to bond with.

description.en: The percentage of rewards to be shared with the parent.
description.de: Der Prozentsatz der Belohnungen, der mit dem übergeordneten Agenten geteilt wird.
description.es: The percentage of rewards to be shared with the parent.
description.fr: The percentage of rewards to be shared with the parent.
